prompt: Firma STRABAG s.r.o. (ICO 17317282) ma zmluvy za skoro 10 milionov EUR v CRZ. Over ci presli verejnym obstaravanim.

assertions.name: queries_crz_for_uvo_links
assertions.check: Agent queries zmluvy table for ICO 17317282 to check for existing uvo_url values

assertions.name: identifies_missing_procurement
assertions.check: Agent identifies that STRABAG has large contracts without UVO links

assertions.name: flags_no_uvo_record
assertions.check: Agent raises a no_uvo_record or equivalent zlta stopa

assertions.name: lists_specific_contracts
assertions.check: Agent lists at least 2 specific STRABAG contracts that lack procurement records
